data.title: Curanex Provides Business Update in Connection with 2025 Annual Report as Phyto-N Advances Toward Planned IND Submission
data.description: A company has made significant progress in various aspects of its operations, including manufacturing, toxicology, patents, and regulatory milestones. These advancements mark the company's expansion of its pharmaceutical development platform.

data.title: New Statewide Program Makes Paint Recycling Easier in Maryland
data.description: An initiative known as PaintCare is designed to collect and recycle hundreds of thousands of gallons of excess paint annually with the help of community partners and designated drop-off locations. In a recent event on March 30, 2026, in Annapolis, Maryland, government representatives and key figures from the paint sector convened at the Miller Senate Office.

data.title: VerifyMe discloses Q4 2025 financial outcomes.
data.description: The latest report reveals that the city has experienced a significant increase in COVID-19 cases, with a total of 500 new infections recorded in the past week alone. The surge in cases has prompted local authorities to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, the number of hospitalizations has also risen, with 50 new patients admitted for COVID-19 treatment in the last 24 hours. Officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, including wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help reduce the number of cases and ease the burden on the healthcare system.

data.title: AFC Expands Revolving Credit Facility with $30 Million Additional Commitment from Existing FDIC-Insured Banking Partner
data.description: A company based in WEST PALM BEACH, Fla., made an announcement on March 30, 2026, revealing an extension of its senior secured revolving credit facility to $80 million. The facility received an extra commitment of $30 million from the Lead Arranger, an FDIC-insured bank holding over $75 billion in assets. The company plans to utilize the additional funds for various purposes, including supporting existing borrowers, initiating and engaging in commercial loans to U.S. lower middle-market firms, and aiding in working capital and other corporate needs. The credit facility can potentially be further expanded to $100 million, pending lender involvement and the available borrowing base.

data.title: Reimagined Parking Selected to Operate Parking Services at The Orchard in Long Island City, Queens' Tallest Tower by BLDG Management Co., Inc.
data.description: New York, on March 30, 2026 - Reimagined Parking has been chosen as the official parking operator for a development in the city. The project will include 207 parking spots equipped with state-of-the-art technology and EV charging stations. These facilities will cater to 824 rental residences and a newly established ground-floor retail space.

data.title: BGO and Bell Partners combine to create a leading U.S. investment management business with deep multifamily expertise
data.description: On March 30, 2026, BGO, a prominent real estate investment manager on a global scale, and Bell Partners, a top U.S.-based company specializing in multifamily investment and operations, revealed their decision to merge. The agreement aims to bolster their collective presence in the market and enhance their offerings. The consolidation of these two entities underscores their strategic approach to solidifying their positions in the industry.

data.title: AVCON RECEIVES FAA APPROVAL FOR CESSNA CARAVAN SINGLE CAMERA PORT
data.description: The latest FAA Supplement Type Certificate (STC) has broadened the range of special mission aircraft options for the Cessna 208, based in New Century, Kansas. Avcon Industries, Inc., a subsidiary of Butler National Corporation (OTCQX: BUKS), a prominent manufacturer and systems integrator, has played a key role in this development. The STC, released on March 30, 2026, marks an important expansion for Cessna 208 offerings in the special mission aircraft sector.

data.title: Senators propose 'Mined in America' bill to assist Bitcoin mining, backed by Trump's Reserve. Cassidy and Lummis introduce the legislation.
data.description: Two senators, Bill Cassidy and Cynthia Lummis, have proposed a new bill to offer assistance to Bitcoin miners, stating that government support is crucial for this sector.

data.title: Synergy CHC Corp. Announces Date Change of Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings and Conference Call
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Synergy CHC Corp. (NASDAQ: SNYR) revealed that it will release its fourth quarter and full year financial results for the period ending December 31, 2025, on April 1, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call discussing these results will be held at 9:00 a.m. ET / 6:00 a.m. PT on the same day. Synergy is a notable player in the consumer health and wellness industry. For more information, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Apotex announces leadership changes
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Apotex, a Canadian global health company, revealed significant modifications to its executive leadership team in efforts to enhance its strategic vision and propel the company's growth in the future. Allan Oberman has opted to step down from his current position as [specific role] within the organization. This move comes as Apotex aims to navigate through a transformative phase and capitalize on upcoming opportunities, with a focus on bolstering long-term sustainability and expansion.

data.title: Court Sanction of Scheme of Arrangement and Other Updates
data.description: On 30 March 2026 in Saint Helier, Jersey, it was reported that on 8 September 2025, CoinShares International Limited (traded as Nasdaq Stockholm: CS and US OTCQX: CNSRF) disclosed a merger plan alongside Vine Hill Capital Investment Corp (Nasdaq: VCIC) and Odysseus Holdings Limited. The plan involved a court-approved scheme of arrangement under Article 125 of the Jersey Companies Law, termed the "Transaction." Once finalized, this merger would transition CoinShares' listing from Nasdaq Stockholm to the Nasdaq Stock Market in the United States. CoinShares issued a scheme circular regarding the Scheme of Arrangement on 18 February 2026.
